readings.Aries: You are already past the point of hesitation. You just haven't caught up to yourself yet.
readings.Taurus: You know what you need. You have always known. The difficulty is in asking for it directly.
readings.Gemini: There is someone in your life who needs your full attention, not your cleverness. Give it to them.
readings.Cancer: Home is not a place you go — it's a state you create. What would it take to feel it now?
readings.Leo: Someone needs to hear what you think. Say it clearly and without hedging.
readings.Virgo: You have helped enough people today. The next person to help is you.
readings.Libra: You want harmony. You also want honesty. Today they are in conflict. Choose honesty.
readings.Scorpio: There is something you need to grieve before you can desire again. Let yourself.
readings.Sagittarius: The horizon is real. It is also not the point. What is between here and there?
readings.Capricorn: You are becoming what you intended. Check whether the intention still fits.
readings.Aquarius: The revolution you believe in is needed. The cost of it, for the people around you, is worth acknowledging.
readings.Pisces: The feeling that's been following you is real. It belongs to you, not to the situation it attached to.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: The competition is never stated and never absent. You perform for each other even when you don't mean to.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: You recognised each other immediately. Whether that's good news depends entirely on what you recognised.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: Something about this combination feels irresistible to both of you. That irresistibility is worth examining.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: Intellectually, this is effortless. Emotionally, you're both still waiting for the other to go first.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: The energy is contagious. People feel it from the outside. Make sure you both still feel it from the inside.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: You recognised each other immediately. Whether that's good news depends entirely on what you recognised.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: The competition is never stated and never absent. You perform for each other even when you don't mean to.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: The security you build together is real. Real security sometimes disguises the need for something more.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: The air feeds the fire, the fire warms the air. You both tend to enjoy this too much to notice when it tips.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: Intellectually, this is effortless. Emotionally, you're both still waiting for the other to go first.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: Neither of you knows how to be small around the other. Decide if that's exhilarating or just exhausting.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from per-sign reading pools; changes each day
